info.name: access-gate
info.description:
REST contract for Pair 10 — Access Gate → Core Business.
Access Gate calls Core Business in realtime to check access policy.


Contact Support:
 Name: FIT4110 Teaching Team
 Email: fit4110@example.edu.vn

request.description:
Access Gate calls this endpoint before opening the gate.
Core Business returns ALLOW or DENY decision.
Retrieve access policy information by policy id.
